html.skin-theme-clientpref-os .mw-parser-output .ib-baseball-bio-member style "background" Elmer Weingartner Shortstop Born: 1918-08-13 August 13, 1918 Cleveland, Ohio Died: March 15, 2009 2009-03-15 aged 90 Elyria, Ohio Batted: Right Threw: Right MLB debut April 19, 1945 , for the Cleveland Indians Last MLB appearance September 28, 1945 , for the Cleveland Indians MLB statistics Batting average .231 Home runs 0 Runs batted in 1 Stats at Baseball Reference Teams Cleveland Indians 1945 Elmer William Weingartner August 13, 1918 March 15, 2009 was a shortstop in Major League Baseball who played for the Cleveland Indians during the 1945 season. Listed at 5 ft 11 in 1.80 m , 178 lb 81 kg , Weingartner batted and threw right-handed . He was born in Cleveland, Ohio . In his one-season career, Weingartner was a .231 hitter 9-for-39 in 20 games, including one RBI , five runs , one double and a .302 on-base percentage without home runs or stolen bases . Weingartner died in Elyria, Ohio , at age 90.
